ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "fname" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "lname" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "stNo" INTEGER /* Student number */,
  "add1" TEXT /* Primary address line 1 */,
  "add2" TEXT /* Primary address line 2 */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "areacode" INTEGER /* Area code of the residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social security number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who took the assessment */,
  "z_minScore" TEXT /* Minimum score in the assessment range */,
  "z_maxScore" TEXT /* Maximum score in the assessment range */,
  "z_cluster" INTEGER /* Cluster number indicating performance category */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was taken */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, exam, assignment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the student enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment the score belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who received the score */,
  "score" TEXT /* Actual score received by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has access to the data */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the access control applies to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level for the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
